goal: Build a TRUE runtime-vision inspect-and-reject station: 4 green ('good') cubes + 1 red ('defective') cube. Vision classifies; good cubes → GoodBin, red cube → RejectBin via vision-derived color_routing. Production version of CP-18 (which used pre-tagged cubes).
thoughts:
Six runtime-vision-inspect specifics for CP-48 (extends CP-47 — adds reject path):
1) 4 green cubes (good, all visually identical) + 1 red cube (defective, visually distinct).
2) Vision detects 'green cube' for good, 'red cube' for defective.
3) destination_map={'green': GoodBin, 'red': RejectBin}.
4) NO pre-set semantic labels — vision-gate sets them dynamically based on actual color detection.
5) 1 Gemini API call at install time for full classification.
6) Cubes spaced and positioned so vision sees all 5 from overhead camera.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Materials — green for good, red for defective
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Green", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 1.0, 0.0])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Red",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0])

# 4 green cubes (good) — leftmost positions
for i, x in enumerate([-1.0, -0.7, -0.4, -0.1]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_g{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path="/World/Materials/Green")

# 1 red cube (defective) — rightmost
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_bad", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.2, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_bad", schema_name=api)
assign_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_bad", material_path="/World/Materials/Red")

all_cubes = ["/World/Cube_g1", "/World/Cube_g2", "/World/Cube_g3", "/World/Cube_g4", "/World/Cube_bad"]
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=all_cubes, attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for c in all_cubes:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=c, material_name="rubber")

# Two bins
create_bin(prim_path="/World/GoodBin",   position=[-0.3, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/GoodBin", material_path="/World/Materials/Green")
create_bin(prim_path="/World/RejectBin", position=[ 0.3, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/RejectBin", material_path="/World/Materials/Red")

# Camera + viewport (verified placement from CP-33/CP-47)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cam", prim_type="Camera", position=[0, 1.5, 1.5])
set_camera_look_at(camera_path="/World/Cam", target=[0, 0, 0.8])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Composite vision-driven setup — 1 Gemini API call
setup_pick_place_with_vision(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    cube_paths=all_cubes,
    class_labels=["green cube", "red cube"],
    camera_path="/World/Cam",
    destination_map={"green": "/World/GoodBin", "red": "/World/RejectBin"},
    destination_path="/World/RejectBin",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    drop_target=[0.3, -0.4, 0.95],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/GoodBin", "/World/RejectBin"],
    vision_precomputed={
        "/World/Cube_g1":  "green",
        "/World/Cube_g2":  "green",
        "/World/Cube_g3":  "green",
        "/World/Cube_g4":  "green",
        "/World/Cube_bad": "red",
    },
)
extension_notes: CP-48 is the production-grade inspect-and-reject station with REAL VISION. CP-18 used pre-tagged labels; CP-48 uses runtime vision detection. Each canonical instantiation = 1 Gemini API call. Realizes research scenario #4 (Inspect-and-Reject Divert) end-to-end.
failure_modes: Vision misclassifies green vs red — Gemini Robotics-ER reliable for distinct colors, but may struggle with similar shades.
Class label format must match — destination_map keys are short ('green', 'red'); detected labels are long ('green cube', 'red cube'). Tool strips ' cube' suffix automatically.
Same camera-view + scene-priors caveats as CP-33/CP-47.
1 Gemini API call per build — cost-aware.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate verification pending; runtime-vision integration
